creator: denis.bykov@cleancode.ru
text:
php5-5.2.11 crashes (segfault) with php5-pgsql-5.2.11_1 included
php compiled with suhosin.

postgresql version:
postgresql-server-8.2.13
postgresql-client-8.2.13

don't know, which information must be also included

How-To-Repeat: install:
lang/php5
lang/php5-extensions with pgsql included
databases/postgresql82-server

run php
